title: crotalaria johnstonii
intro: Crotalaria johnstonii, also known as the Johnston's rattle pod, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to tropical regions of Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high alkaloid content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating fever, and acting as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Crotalaria johnstonii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
